news.headline: Verizon offers limited-time deals on popular gifts for gaming and music during Holiday Deal Days.
news.summary: Don't miss out on exclusive deals for this year's most sought-after gifts in gaming, music, and more. Hurry to save on limited-time offers while they last.

news.headline: Ruling Party Chief asks Yoon to announce martial law lift - Maeil.
Herbalife Family Foundation awards $5 million in grants to 164 nonprofits in 59 countries to empower communities globally.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, the Herbalife Family Foundation (HFF) disclosed the allocation of $5 million in grants to 164 nonprofit organizations in 59 countries and territories. These grants, facilitated through the Casa Herbalife Program, are aimed at supporting nonprofit partners committed to ensuring access to healthy meals, educational tools, and secure environments for children and marginalized communities globally. The assistance provided by HFF and its Casa Herbalife Program is backed by funding from various sources.

news.headline: Funding to accelerate growth and support possible listing on London main market. Details restricted.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024 in Reykjavík, it was announced that certain information and appendices are restricted and should not be released, published, or distributed in the United States, Iceland, Australia, Japan, South Africa, or any other jurisdiction where it would be unlawful to do so. This announcement contains crucial details that must be carefully reviewed.

news.headline: Proposed fundraising to accelerate growth, restricted for certain jurisdictions. Reykjavík, Dec 03, 2024.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, an announcement was made in Reykjavík containing restricted information not meant for release in the United States, Iceland, Australia, Japan, South Africa, or any other jurisdiction where it could be unlawful. The details, inclusive of the appendices, are withheld from publication or distribution in these regions. It is crucial to refer to the important notices segment in the announcement for further guidance.

news.headline: StockX had record trades on Cyber Monday with brands like Asics, Fear of God, Pop Mart, and Timberland setting new trade records. Top products included Travis Scott's collab, Asics and adidas sneakers, and Fear of God apparel.
news.summary: The company experienced an all-time high in trades during Cyber Monday. Asics, Fear of God, Pop Mart, and Timberland all achieved new trade records over the entire week. Top-selling items across various categories included Travis Scott's recent collaboration with Jordan, Asics and adidas sneakers, Fear of God clothing, and Ugg products.

news.headline: Global Industrial Absorbent Market to reach $5.50 billion by 2031, growing at 4.3% CAGR. Insights reveal significant growth trends.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, a recent report from The Insight Partners revealed notable growth in the global Industrial Absorbents Market. The report, focused on the period up to 2031, analyzes various segments, geographical trends, market dynamics, recent advancements, and strategic insights. Key factors driving this growth include increasing demand for industrial absorbents. The market is projected to witness substantial expansion, with significant opportunities emerging in the industry. This growth is attributed to various factors such as technological advancements, shifting consumer preferences, and evolving market dynamics. The global Industrial Absorbents Market is expected to experience a positive trajectory, with a focus on strategic insights and recent developments shaping the industry landscape.

news.headline: NEO Battery Materials' operations in South Korea remain stable despite martial law declaration; operations unaffected.
news.summary: NEO Battery Materials Ltd. (TSXV: NBM) (OTC: NBMFF) reassures stakeholders that the declaration of emergency martial law in South Korea will not affect its operations. The company, a developer of low-cost silicon anode materials for lithium-ion batteries, confirms that its Research and Development (R&D) Scale-Up Centre in the country remains unaffected. As of 1 AM KT on December 4, 2024, the South Korean National Assembly has passed a resolution to end the martial law.

news.headline: ACE Cash Express raises $25,000+ for Autism Speaks during Give A Little Campaign; partnership since 2015.
news.summary: In Dallas on December 3, 2024, ACE Cash Express (ACE), a brand under Populus Financial Group, Inc., generated more than $25,000 for Autism Speaks through its Give A Little Campaign fundraiser. Since 2015, ACE Cash Express has been backing Autism Speaks, motivated by the discovery that certain...

news.headline: Disaster recovery costs surge by 30%, with a 116% increase in survivors seeking assistance in 2024, per Project Porchlight.
news.summary: In December 2024 in Stafford, Texas, Money Management International (MMI) reported a significant increase in the financial struggles faced by survivors due to escalating natural disasters. The number of individuals seeking assistance from MMI's Project Porchlight jumped by 116% in October compared to the previous year, indicating a heightened demand for post-disaster recovery aid. Kate Bulger, MMI's Vice President of Business Development, highlighted the unprecedented challenges confronting clients, such as soaring housing costs and mounting unsecured debt. Project Porchlight aims to provide support to families navigating these difficulties. This surge in demand underscores the pressing need for disaster recovery assistance in 2024.

news.headline: Transflo introduces Wallet Fuel Card for trucking companies, offering major discounts nationwide to save on fuel costs.
news.summary: A fuel payment and management solution known as the Transflo Wallet Fuel Card has been introduced in Tampa, Fla. This card aims to assist trucking companies in reducing fuel costs.

news.headline: Chainlink experiences 27% surge in price within 24 hours due to integration with EU tokenized asset service, sparking high user activity.
news.summary: After revealing an integration of an EU-based tokenized asset service, LINK experienced a substantial 27% increase in value within a day. This announcement led to a significant rise in user engagement on the platform.

news.headline: John Maddison joins F5 as Chief Product Marketing and Technology Alliances Officer, enhancing market impact. Reporting to CEO. (Word count: 21)
news.summary: In Seattle, F5 (NASDAQ: FFIV) has appointed John Maddison as the new Chief Product Marketing and Technology Alliances Officer, under the supervision of CEO François Locoh-Donou. Maddison will head a newly formed team focused on enhancing F5’s market presence and fulfilling the company’s commitment through its products and collaborations. With over two decades of experience, F5 has been known for ensuring the security and efficient delivery of essential applications.

news.headline: Veza releases Access Requests product for automated access policy intelligence, reducing identity-based threats.
news.summary: Veza, a California-based company, has introduced a new product, Veza Access Requests, aimed at enhancing Identity Security for organizations. This product offers automated access policy intelligence for application access, helping to mitigate identity-based threats. With Veza Access Requests, users requesting access will be provisioned automatically based on the principle of least privilege right from the start. This marks a significant advancement as access requests are now powered by permission algorithms. This innovation will provide organizations with greater control over their access policies and help reduce security risks.

news.headline: GDC partners with AI Summit NY for generative AI discussions in game development, offers GDC Stage, GDC Zone.
news.summary: In San Francisco, the Game Developers Conference (GDC), the leading event for gaming professionals, will collaborate with The AI Summit New York to introduce the GDC Stage. This platform will feature discussions on generative artificial intelligence (AI) in game development. Additionally, they will unveil the GDC Zone, an area showcasing interactive demos and networking prospects with renowned developers. This partnership will offer attendees a unique opportunity to immerse themselves in AI advancements at the event.

news.headline: Nitrogen launches Advisor Engagement, Marketing & Distribution product for asset managers to scale personalized advice.
news.summary: In Auburn, California, Nitrogen (formerly known as Riskalyze) introduced Nitrogen for Asset Managers, a new offering that aims to enhance how wealth management firms provide personalized advice at scale. This software is designed to showcase asset managers' products effectively within Nitrogen’s advanced risk tolerance, investment analytics, and proposal generation advisor workflow. Additionally, it provides comprehensive reporting on product uptake, competitive positioning, and other key metrics to assist asset managers in optimizing their offerings.

news.headline: Planar introduces next-gen Planar CarbonLight CLI Series LED displays for various applications.Characters: 218
news.summary: A company based in Portland, Oregon, specializing in visualization technology, unveiled their latest product, the Planar® CarbonLight™ CLI Series indoor LED video wall displays. These new displays promise improved visual performance and a revamped cabinet design, catering to various applications such as rental and staging, in-camera virtual production, extended reality, and on-camera broadcast. The upgraded line is lightweight and aims to enhance user experience. This advancement underlines the company's commitment to innovation in the LED display industry.

news.headline: Bridge Growth Partners sold Syniti to Capgemini, a data management leader. Fourth cash exit in three years, sale terms undisclosed.
news.summary: A technology investment firm, Bridge Growth Partners, LLC, based in New York, has successfully finalized the sale of Syniti (previously known as BackOffice Associates) to Capgemini, a prominent global enterprise data management company. This marks Bridge Growth's fourth cash exit in three years through a strategic deal. The financial details of the transaction remain undisclosed. Bridge Growth Partners specializes in technology investments.

news.headline: New book "The Book of HOV: A Tribute To JAY-Z" commemorates immersive exhibit with release on December 4th in NYC. Character count: 105
news.summary: Celebrating the legacy of Jay-Z, a new book titled "The Book of HOV: A Tribute to Jay-Z" has been released by Roc Nation and Assouline. Set to be available starting December 4th, 2024, this special title reflects on the iconic artist's impact. The book combines images and stories to honor Jay-Z's influence on music and culture. Interested individuals can access press photos related to the book. This significant publication marks a milestone in recognizing Jay-Z's journey, with New York serving as the backdrop for its announcement on December 3, 2024.

news.headline: Hublot marks 25th Anniversary of OpusX with special Classic Fusion Chronograph. Limited edition: CLASSIC FUSION CHRONOGRAPH ARTURO FUENTE KING GOLD. Event in Dominican Republic. #Hublot
news.summary: Explore the latest timepiece release, the Classic Fusion Chronograph Arturo Fuente King Gold, by Hublot. Follow @Hublot for updates. Located in Santiago de los Caballeros, Dominican Republic, as of Dec. 3, 2024, this luxury watch showcases a collaboration embodying quality and a dedication to refinement. immerse yourself in a world of elegance and sophistication with this new release.

news.headline: Pivot Bio appoints Melih Keyman to board of directors, bringing agriculture and fertilizer expertise. Dec 3, 2024.
news.summary: Pivot Bio, a top agtech company, based in BERKELEY, Calif., revealed on Dec. 3, 2024, the addition of Melih Keyman to their Board of Directors. Keyman, with a wealth of experience in agriculture and fertilizers, joins the leading growth company to provide expertise in this field. Pivot Bio's significant growth and innovation in the agriculture sector has made it a standout, and with this new appointment, the company is poised to further enhance its strategies.

news.headline: Unlikely Collaborators grant supports Closegap in mental health advocacy for youth in LA with tech.
news.summary: In a recent development on December 3, 2024, Unlikely Collaborators announced the allocation of a grant to Closegap, a nonprofit in Los Angeles. This organization aims to provide mental health resources for youth through the use of technology and community involvement. As part of this grant, Closegap will further develop its digital platform to reach a wider audience and offer better support services.

news.headline: Disneyland Resort offers SoCal residents a special 3-day ticket at $199 total, valid Jan-May 2025, kids ticket at $50/day.
news.summary: Residents in Southern California who qualify can now buy tickets for visits to Disneyland Park or Disney California Adventure Park from January 1 to May 15, 2025. There are discounts available, such as a Kids' Special Ticket Offer priced at $50 per day for one park per day access.

news.headline: San Manuel Band of Mission Indians donates $1 million in grants for wildfire relief and conservation on Giving Tuesday.
news.summary: In Highland, California on December 3, 2024, the San Manuel Band of Mission Indians revealed their contribution of $1 million in grants to aid recovery, conservation, and wildfire prevention in areas at risk from recent wildfires. This generous donation comes as part of their Giving Tuesday campaign to support affected communities.

news.headline: BSCC expands services with new wing thanks to partnership with San Manuel Band of Mission Indians & Loma Linda University.
news.summary: The partnership between the San Manuel Band of Mission Indians and Loma Linda University Children's Hospital has enabled the implementation of services in the Pavilion for Child and Adolescent Health at Rancho Mirage, California. On December 3, 2024, the Barbara Sinatra Children's Center (BSCC) inaugurated the facilities with support from the mentioned collaborators.

news.headline: Acumen Velocity enables translation to 135 languages on Google Cloud Marketplace. Launches Acumen Translation Hub.
news.summary: Acumen Velocity, a reliable Google Cloud partner, has introduced the Acumen Translation Hub (ATH) on Google Cloud, enabling customers to conduct extensive document translations efficiently. The service was launched in Irvine, California on December 3, 2024.

news.headline: MicroBT's M66S miners achieve record performance in Rosseau's immersion cooling system - revolutionizing Bitcoin mining.
news.summary: In Taylor, Texas on December 3, 2024, a groundbreaking development has emerged in the realm of Bitcoin mining. A partnership between Rosseau's Immersion Cooling technology and MicroBT's M66S Miner has revolutionized the industry. This collaboration has significantly enhanced performance and efficiency in Bitcoin mining operations. The cutting-edge technology has resulted in a remarkable increase in hashrate performance, providing miners with unparalleled uptime and productivity. This innovation marks a significant advancement in the field, promising improved efficiency and performance for miners in the cryptocurrency space.

news.headline: In Howell, Mich., 90% found the perfect real Christmas tree at the first place they visited. Joyful search for all. 🎄 #ChristmasTreeJoy
news.summary: Excitement awaits both those who stick to seasonal traditions and those who procrastinate on finding the perfect Christmas tree. In Howell, Michigan, a survey revealed that 90% of respondents successfully located their desired real Christmas tree at their initial shopping destination in 2023. As the holiday season approaches this year, a similar trend is expected to bring joy to Christmas tree shoppers once again.

news.headline: United Way of Metro Chicago gets $7.5M gift from BMO, boosting Neighborhood Network Initiative in Auburn Gresham and Little Village.
news.summary: A recent corporate gift from BMO demonstrates the bank's dedication to supporting communities on a global scale. This gift, alongside other substantial investments, aims to speed up the execution of community initiatives in Auburn Gresham and Little Village. The contribution was made in Chicago on Dec. 3, 2024, through United Way of Metro Chicago.

news.headline: Hyundai donates $50,000 to UCI Health for new Diabetic Exam Room and Diabetic Group Medical Visits.
news.summary: Hyundai Hope has made a significant contribution to improve diabetes care facilities at the UCI Health Family Health Center in Santa Ana and Anaheim, California. The donation of $50,000 from Hyundai Motor America will support the establishment of a new Diabetic Exam Room and Diabetic Group Medical Visits at the center. This initiative aims to enhance healthcare services for diabetic patients in these communities.

news.headline: McLean & Company highlights early insights for HR trends in 2025, emphasizing technology, leadership dev, and retention.
news.summary: McLean & Company, a prominent HR research and advisory organization, has released a preview of the HR Trends Report 2025. This report, scheduled for publication in January 2025, aims to provide HR leaders with essential data and insights to effectively manage their organizations. The report is highly anticipated and is set to offer valuable information to enhance HR strategies and decision-making processes.

news.headline: Chemed Corporation to present at BofA Securities 2024 Virtual Home Care Conference on Dec. 10, 2024, 1:20 PM (ET). Webcast available on Chemed website for 90 days.
news.summary: Chemed Corporation (NYSE:CHE) has disclosed its participation in the BofA Securities 2024 Virtual Home Care Conference scheduled for Tuesday, December 10, 2024, at 1:20 PM (ET). The event will be broadcasted live on the Chemed website at www.chemed.com under the Investor Relations section. Access to the presentation materials will also be provided. The webcast replay will be accessible within 24 hours of the original presentation and will remain available for 90 days. Notably, Chemed Corporation is listed on the New York Stock Exchange.

news.headline: URW SE reports total voting rights and shares in share capital as of November 30, 2024.
Selection of employee reps for ISS A/S Board, key in company decisions. glimpses shared and employee numbers considered.
Sodexo reports buying its own shares in transactions totaling 100,000 from Nov 25-27, 2024.
Nvidia dominates A.I. chips, but Amazon, AMD, and startups are rising contenders for "inferencing" phase.
news.summary: Amazon, Advanced Micro Devices, and multiple start-up companies are now introducing viable substitutes to Nvidia’s chips, particularly focusing on a stage of A.I. advancement referred to as “inferencing.” This development showcases a noteworthy shift in the industry, with a growing number of players contributing to diversifying the market for chips.

news.headline: AWS Trainium2 instances are now generally available, promising high performance and cost efficiency for training and deploying AI models.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, during AWS re:Invent, Amazon Web Services, Inc. revealed that AWS Trainium2-powered Amazon EC2 instances are now generally available. Additionally, they introduced new Trn2 UltraServers, allowing customers to train and deploy current AI models along with future large language models (LLM) and foundation models (FM) with high performance and cost efficiency. This announcement comes as part of Amazon.com, Inc.'s initiatives, listed on NASDAQ as AMZN.

news.headline: Impact Development Partners is building a 330-unit HōM community in Temple Terrace to cater to Tampa's workforce housing needs, with financial backing from Trustmark and Great Southern Bank. TAMPA, Fla., Dec. 3, 2024.
news.summary: A new apartment complex comprising 330 units is set to be constructed in Temple Terrace. The project has garnered support from Impact Development Management and will receive financial backing from Trustmark and Great Southern Bank. The initiative, initiated by Impact Development Partners (IDP), is a collaborative effort with capital partners. The announcement was made in Tampa, Florida on December 3, 2024.

news.headline: Salgenx introduces innovative Saltwater Redox Flow Battery for grid-scale energy storage, transforming industry.
news.summary: A new Saltwater Redox Flow Battery has been introduced by Salgenx in Madison, Wisconsin. This battery is both safe and scalable, presenting a sustainable alternative for grid-scale energy storage. The launch of this technology signifies a significant advancement in the field of clean energy, offering a viable solution for storing large amounts of energy efficiently. This innovation has the potential to revolutionize the way in which energy is stored on a grid-scale level.

news.headline: Fresh Thyme hosts 9th fundraiser to support Vitamin Angels, providing 6.5 million* moms and kids with vitamins.
news.summary: Fresh Thyme Market, a Midwest grocery store located in DOWNERS GROVE, Ill., has collaborated with Vitamin Angels for an extended period to positively impact the lives of over 6.5 million* mothers and children by providing essential vitamins. This partnership is part of Fresh Thyme Market's commitment to promoting better health within communities.

news.headline: Chaberton Energy is recognized by Inc. in the 2024 Best in Business List, one of four in Environmental Issues category.
news.summary: Recognizing outstanding achievements in various industries worldwide, the yearly list highlights companies excelling in their field. Chaberton was honored as one of four recipients in the Environmental Issues category. This accolade was announced on December 3, 2024 in ROCKVILLE, Md. Chaberton Energy, specializing in distributed energy development, was commended for its exceptional performance.

news.headline: Amazon S3 integrates Apache Iceberg tables for faster analytics, adding automatic metadata generation for simplified data understanding.
news.summary: Today at AWS re:Invent in Las Vegas, Amazon Web Services (AWS), a subsidiary of Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN), introduced new enhancements to Amazon Simple Storage Service (Amazon S3). These updates position S3 as the pioneering cloud storage service to offer complete support for Apache Iceberg, enabling quicker analytics and providing a user-friendly method for storing and organizing tabular data of any size. The latest features encompass the capability to automatically create searchable metadata, streamlining data exploration and comprehension.

news.headline: SoCalREN launches "Hi, Energy!" podcast with climate comedian Esteban Gast in LA, aiming to bring humor to serious topics.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on December 3, 2024, the Southern California Regional Energy Network (SoCalREN) introduced a new podcast named "Hi, Energy!," hosted by the city's climate comedian, Esteban Gast. The podcast is designed to provide a unique approach to discussing vital topics related to energy and climate change. Esteban Gast, renowned for his humorous take on serious subjects, will lead the podcast, aiming to engage audiences through funny anecdotes and informative content.

news.headline: K1 Speed opens second Seattle go-kart center in Tukwila - largest operator, all-electric karts.
news.summary: In Tukwila, Washington on December 3, 2024, K1 Speed, the leading indoor go-kart racing company globally, revealed the launch of its second venue in the larger Seattle region, called K1 Speed Tukwila. The new location ensures an authentic racing adventure with fully electric go-karts, emphasizing sustainability and cutting-edge technology.

news.headline: Christopher Meloni partners with Tommie Copper on Giving Tuesday to support Global Lyme Alliance, raising awareness for Lyme disease.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, in Mt. Kisco, NY, renowned actor Christopher Meloni, a dedicated supporter of Lyme disease awareness, collaborates with Tommie Copper and the Global Lyme Alliance (GLA) for a charitable campaign on Giving Tuesday. This initiative aims to make philanthropy more appealing.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency pioneer Vitalik Buterin advocates for enhanced security and privacy features in Web3 wallets.
news.summary: A recent report indicates that the population of bees in the United States has decreased by 40% over the past year. This decline is alarming as bees play a crucial role in pollinating crops and maintaining biodiversity. The loss of bees not only impacts food production but also the overall health of ecosystems. Experts suggest that factors such as pesticide use, habitat loss, and climate change are contributing to the decline in bee populations. Efforts are now being made to raise awareness about the importance of bees and to implement measures to protect and support their habitats. It is crucial to address this issue to ensure the health and sustainability of our environment.

news.headline: Acathia Capital increases stake in Swedish savings platform Futur with backing from Montana Capital Partners and Prudential Financial.
news.summary: Acathia Capital, based in Frankfurt, Germany, has completed its second GP-led secondary transaction, boosting its ownership in Futur, the top pension and savings platform in Sweden. This strategic move was supported by Montana Capital Partners (MCP), a renowned private equity secondaries investment manager part of PGIM - the investment management arm of Prudential Financial, Inc. MCP, a major investor in this deal, collaborated with a German insurance company to solidify the transaction.

news.headline: South Korean Defense Ministry official cited by YTN TV
Core Bank's Overland Park Banking Center to relocate on Dec. 10, 2024, for growth and client needs. New location offers modern space.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, in Overland Park, Kansas, Core Bank announced the relocation of the Overland Park Banking Center scheduled for December 10, 2024. The move signifies Core Bank's commitment to expansion and meeting clients' financial requirements in the community. The updated venue offers improved facilities for better customer service...

news.headline: BrightTower advises TechTarget in combination with Informa Tech, creating Informa TechTarget, merging TechTarget with Informa Tech's digital businesses under Informa PLC (LSE).
news.summary: Yesterday, it was announced that Informa TechTarget has been established after the merger of TechTarget and Informa Tech's digital divisions was finalized. TechTarget, a key player in purchase intent-driven services globally, united with Informa Tech, a segment of Informa PLC (LSE:...), marking a significant move in the industry.
